raw.official description: Steel Trap's throw range is increased by 50% and trapped enemies cannot be healed.
raw.ability details: * ''Removed in Season 18.'' * [[Anti-heal]] from Aluminium Frame is tied to the trapped status. Only effects that completely free the target from the trap can remove it: ** This includes [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]], [[File:Ability Orisa Fortify.png|sub|link=Orisa#Fortify|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Fortify|Fortify]], [[File:Ability Sombra Translocator.png|sub|link=Sombra#Translocator|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Translocator|Translocator]] (pre-thrown), being lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] or [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] and teleporting with [[File:Ability-symmetra4.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Teleporter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Teleporter|Teleporter]]. ** [[File:Protection_Suzu_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Protection Suzu|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Protection Suzu|Protection Suzu]], [[File:Ability-mei2.png|sub|link=Mei#Cryo-Freeze|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Cryo-Freeze|Cryo-Freeze]] and [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle/Projected Barrier]] - which normally could cleanse anti-heal and be used while trapped - cannot remove the anti-heal from Aluminum Frame due to not being able to remove the "Trapped" status.

raw.official description: After launching with Concussion Mine, Junkrat gains 35% increased attack speed for 3 seconds.
raw.ability details: * Does not stack. Subsequent launches refresh the duration.

raw.official description: Frag Launcher’s projectile speed is increased by 25%
Eliminations with Concussion Mine restore one charge.
During RIP-Tire, use (LSHIFT) to gain a quick boost of speed. Doing so reduces RIP-Tire’s damage by 50%.
Concussive Mine strengthens 0.25 second after landing, increasing damage by 50%, explosion radius by 50%, and health by 200%.

abilities.name: Total Mayhem
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Deals no damage to self with explosives. Drop bombs on death.
raw.ability details: * The grenades will be dropped at wherever Junkrat was killed, and do not inherit his momentum. Being killed while flying through the air will drop the grenades straight down to the ground. * The grenades can be negated by [[D.Va]]'s [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[Orisa]]'s [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[Sigma]]'s [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[Doomfist]]'s [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[Mizuki]]'s [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and they can be deflected by [[Genji]]'s [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before exploding. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified. * The grenades can penetrate [[barrier]]s, but their explosions cannot.

abilities.name: Concussion Mine
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Throw a knockback mine with LSHIFT then detonate it with [[File:Key mouse 2.png|20x20px|link=]].
raw.cast time: 0.128 second for throw + 0.112 s. recovery for detonation
raw.ability details: * The mine sticks to any terrain and bounces off of players and [[objects]] other than [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]]. * The mine bounces once upon hitting a [[barrier]] for the first time, but can then pass through it. The explosion is blocked by barriers. * The mine can be destroyed by enemy players, causing no explosion. * The projectile can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]],[[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before it attaches to a surface. The explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Explosion damage alone going through is not amplified. * Upon cast time ends, you can change the future flight path. * If the ability is interrupted before the mine begins to exist, the cooldown will not start and the charge will not be spent. * If Junkrat throws another mine while one is already deployed the first mine will instantly and silently disappear. * The mine does not deal self-damage, but still applies the knockback, making it usable as a mobility tool. * Junkrat and enemies caught in the blast are knocked up 45° vertically, regardless of their position relative to the mine. * Horizontal knockback is away from the center of the mine. *If Junkrat is hacked, the remote will be disabled.

raw.shot type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
raw.cast time:
instantly + 0.33 s recovery
.75 second arming time
raw.ability details: * Similarly to his [[File:Ability-Junkrat2.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Concussion Mine|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Concussion Mine|Concussion Mine]], deploying a second Steel Trap will remove the first. * The trap sticks to ground and [[objects]] with a walkable surface, and bounces off of players, walls and other object surfaces. * The trap bounces once upon hitting a [[barrier]] for the first time, but can then fall through it. * An unactivated trap can be destroyed by enemy players. * Junkrat can see the trap's location through walls. * The player receives a cue when an enemy triggers or destroys the trap. * Being in phased out state or affected by Zarya's [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle/Protective Barrier]] will prevent a trap from triggering, but will not free a player that is already trapped. * Orisa can break free from the trap by activating [[File:Ability Orisa Fortify.png|sub|link=Orisa#Fortify|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Fortify|Fortify]]. * Lifeweaver can pull the target free with [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]]. * Sombra can escape from the trap with [[File:Ability Sombra Translocator.png|sub|link=Sombra#Translocator|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Translocator|Translocator]], however it must be in air when the trap activates, as it is a movement ability that gets disabled by the trap. * If a trapped player is moved sufficiently far from it, e.g. by using Symmetra's [[File:Ability-symmetra4.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Teleporter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Teleporter|Teleporter]] or being lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] or [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]], the trap will break and the target will be freed. However, if the trap was placed on the object, the player will remain trapped even if lifted, as the trap can move with it.

abilities.name: Frag Launcher
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds animation
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 180 while firing (124.13 overall w/reload) * The grenades explode after: ** 2 times bouncing off the ground. ** Bouncing off the surroundings and landing on the ground afterwards. ** Getting contact with an enemy hitbox. ** 4.5 seconds of flight without hitting solid objects. * Before a nade detonates, an audio cue is played and can be heard if nearby. The nade then freezes in place for 0,3 second pre-detonation, during which the explosion can't be stopped by any means. If the nade is shot bouncing on the ground, or just bounce off a wall/an object, it'll explode if it bounces a second time less than 1,5 second after the first bounce. Nades can bounce on walls and objects several times without exploding. * The projectile size is decreased after its second bounce. * The velocity of the projectile is slightly reduced after each bounce. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the splash is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

abilities.name: RIP-Tire
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Drive and detonate an exploding tire.
raw.cast time:
1.58 + 0.08 seconds (activation)
0 + 1.0 seconds (detonation)
raw.ability details:
* Can be interrupted during the startup, but upon gaining control of the tire, the ability will continue and can be detonated regardless of whether Junkrat or the tire is hit by any [[crowd control]] or if Junkrat dies.
* If the tire is destroyed, no detonation occurs and the ability ends early.
* Junkrat is rooted while this ability is active.
* RIP-Tire can jump and climb walls.
* The explosion is blocked by [[barrier]]s, but the tire itself can travel through them.
